user.title: Välj land
user.description: Det valda landet används för att kontrollera allmänna helgdagar

subdivision.title: Select region
subdivision.description: Some countries have regional holidays. Select your state/region for the most accurate holiday calendar, or choose 'Entire country' to use only national holidays

frequency.title: Välj utbetalningsfrekvens
frequency.description: Välj hur ofta du får lön

monthly_day.title: Välj dag i månaden
monthly_day.description: Välj vilken dag i månaden du får lön

bank_offset.title: Dagar före den sista bankdagen
bank_offset.description: Om du får lön några dagar före den sista bankdagen, välj hur många dagar före

specific_day.title: Välj specifik dag
specific_day.description: Välj den exakta dagen du får lön varje månad

cycle_last_paydate.title: Välj senaste löneutbetalning
cycle_last_paydate.description: Välj det senaste datumet du fick lön. Detta används för att beräkna nästa löneutbetalning

weekly.title: Välj veckovis löneutbetalning
weekly.description: Välj vilken veckodag du får lön varje vecka

init.title: Justera inställningarna för IsItPayday
init.description: Ändra inställningarna för den här löneutbetalningsspåraren

subdivision.title: Select region
subdivision.description: Some countries have regional holidays. Select your state/region for the most accurate holiday calendar, or choose 'Entire country' to use only national holidays

frequency.title: Select payout frequency
frequency.description: Choose how often you get paid

monthly_day.title: Select day of month
monthly_day.description: Choose which day of the month you are paid

bank_offset.title: Days before the last banking day
bank_offset.description: If you are paid a few days before the last banking day, choose how many days before

specific_day.title: Select specific day
specific_day.description: Select the exact day you are paid each month

cycle_last_paydate.title: Select last payday
cycle_last_paydate.description: Select the last date you were paid. This will be used to calculate the next payday

weekly.title: Select weekly payday
weekly.description: Choose which weekday you are paid each week

unsupported_country.title: Country no longer supported
unsupported_country.description: The country "{country}" configured for IsItPayday is no longer supported by the holidays library. Please open the integration options and select a supported country.
